title: Uruguayan Lentil Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Uruguay, made with lentils, rich beef broth, and a hint of curry.

ingredients.name: lentils
ingredients.notes: green or brown lentils work well

ingredients.name: beef broth
ingredients.notes: rich beef broth is essential to this uruguayan dish

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion, garlic, carrot, and celery. Cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add curry powder and cook for 1 minute.
Add lentils, beef broth, tomato paste, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes or until the lentils are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
